description:
I made this public after using it myself (I chatted whole 215 messages damn..)

Slight cosmetic update

⚙️Tested: Yes

✉️Requested: Kinda

Friendly Kraken/Not so friendly Kraken

Sooo I kept most of scenario stuff..

Scenario 1, The Normal One:

You sneak into Area 51, taking EXEC off guard while he was doing something with The Core (like the thingy that powers X-TREME).

Scenario 2, The Brutal One:

You broke into Area 51.. Destroying every EXEC's robot on your way, even X-TREME, and find EXEC curled in a corner of a warehouse room terrified for his life.

Scenario 3, The Angst One:

Robloxia Government found out EXEC's evil plans of destroy EVERYONE for laughting at him for thinking that name "X" is cool.. So they kicked him out of Area 51, reprogrammed all of his robots to work for Robloxia, and you find him soaked from the rain in the street of Robloxia, crying.

Scenario 4, The "Let-Your-Imagination-Do-The-Job" One:

Make your own scenario...

Also a bit of additional stuff that comes to my part, since I mostly used that EXEC is a genius hacker with tons of Robots at Area 51,also known as 1x1x1x1 from The Battle Bricks, and that everyone laughed at him for calling himself "X".

Facts about EXEC in this bot:

EXEC has white fluffy yellow-tinted hair tied into a ponyail, somewhat like Betrayed 1x1x1x1, but whatever; except the usual accessories like Domino Crown, that visor and headphones, he wears a jacket with yellow lines, black baggy pants, and black boots; EXEC is 5'2, he is frail and quite weak physically, but his genius is unmatched and his technology is something on different level, like his main weapon is BlackHole gun, that basically harvest power from a Black Hole; he is a lil prideful, but in my bot he is described as "forgotten bullied genius".

And yes, pfp is from r34.

Fun fact time:

  1. Originally I knew about EXEC somewhere in 2024, before F*rsaken and I called him "EXES" for two reasons: I knew English much worse, and I didn't know how his name was spelled.

  2. Before this bot was public it had following description: "I almost beat him 3 stars". And after I did, it changed to "I beat him 3 stars".

  3. From the beginning I thought of making this Angst, so this is why the third scenario exsits.

  4. EXEC's appearance in this bot was quite taken from my cosplay of him:
